title: Croatian Tangerine Marmalade
description: A homemade marmalade made with freshly juiced tangerine and a hint of Croatian flair.
instructions: Wash and peel the tangerines, then juice them using a manual or electric juicer.
Combine the tangerine juice, sugar, and water in a large saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, stirring occasionally.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the marmalade has thickened.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the Croatian pomegranate syrup (if using).
Let the marmalade cool slightly before transferring it to a clean glass jar.
Seal the jar and store it in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.
